request.description:
## Todos By ID

Retrieves a single todo item by its ID from the API.

### HTTP Method & Endpoint

```
GET {{base_url}}/todos/{{user_id}}
```

### Path Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `{{user_id}}` | The ID of the todo item to retrieve |

### Expected Response

Returns a JSON object representing the todo item with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `userId` | integer | The ID of the user who owns the todo |
| `id` | integer | The unique ID of the todo item |
| `title` | string | The title/description of the todo |
| `completed` | boolean | Whether the todo has been completed |

### Example Response

```json
{
  "userId": 1,
  "id": 5,
  "title": "laboriosam mollitia et enim quasi adipisci quia provident illum",
  "completed": false
}
```

request.description:
Creates a new todo item. Sends a POST request to the todos endpoint using the `{{base_url}}` and `{{post_path}}` variables.

**Request Body (JSON):**
- `userId` (integer): The ID of the user the todo belongs to.
- `id` (integer): The unique identifier for the new todo item.
- `title` (string): The title/description of the todo. Uses the `{{todo_title}}` variable.
- `completed` (boolean): The completion status of the todo. Set to `false` for a newly created item.

**Response:**
Returns the created todo object with a `201 Created` status code.

request.description:
## Partial todos Modification by ID

This request performs a **partial update** on a specific todo item using the HTTP `PATCH` method. Unlike `PUT`, `PATCH` allows you to update only the fields you provide, leaving the rest of the resource unchanged.

---

### Endpoint

```
PATCH {{base_url}}/todos/{{todo_id}}
```

### Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `{{base_url}}` | The base URL of the API (defined in the active environment) |
| `{{todo_id}}` | The unique identifier of the todo item to be partially updated |

---

### Request Body (raw JSON)

```json
{
    "userId": 56,
    "title": "Formation Postam Jour 2 PostmanPostman finished",
    "completed": true
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `userId` | integer | The ID of the user who owns the todo item |
| `title` | string | The updated title/description of the todo item |
| `completed` | boolean | Indicates whether the todo item has been completed (`true`) or not (`false`) |

---

### Expected Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

The response body contains the updated todo object reflecting the changes sent in the request body:

```json
{
    "userId": 56,
    "id": <todo_id>,
    "title": "Formation Postam Jour 2 PostmanPostman finished",
    "completed": true
}
```

## Delete todos by ID

Deletes a specific todo item by its unique identifier.

**Method:** `DELETE`
**Endpoint:** `{{base_url}}/todos/{{todo_id}}`

### Path Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `todo_id` | The unique ID of the todo item to delete |

### Response

Returns an empty object `{}` or a `200 OK` status upon successful deletion.
